class.name: CadPlane
class.description: [CadPlane] wraps an OCCT [code]gp_Pln[/code] and represents an oriented work plane with origin, normal, and in-plane axes. It uses a distinct name to avoid conflicting with Godot's built-in [code]Plane[/code] math type.

method.name: set_plane
method.description: Sets the plane origin, normal, and preferred local X direction.

method.name: get_x_direction
method.description: Returns the local in-plane X direction.

method.name: get_y_direction
method.description: Returns the local in-plane Y direction.

method.name: signed_distance_to_point
method.description: Returns the signed distance from the plane to [param point].

method.name: project_point
method.description: Projects [param point] orthogonally onto the plane.

method.name: offsetted
method.description: Returns a copy of the plane offset along its normal by [param distance].

method.name: transformed
method.description: Returns the plane transformed by [param location].
